backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining core business logic for orders and deliveries, including types (Product, Order, Delivery), state management with Maps, and public functions for placing orders, scheduling deliveries, fetching order history, and updating order status.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the clickable QR code implementation on OrderForm page that redirects users to PhonePe for payment, with high confidence and test ID REQ-14.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including styling, routing, pages (Home, Products, OrderForm with clickable PhonePe QR, Contact, OrderHistory, DeliverySchedule), layout components, WhatsApp integration, and React Query hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm dairy-themed color palette in OKLCH format for both light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Parwati Dairy App with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, products, order form, contact, order history, and delivery schedule, all wrapped in Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Responsive layout component with sticky header featuring Parwati Dairy logo, Hindi tagline, desktop/mobile navigation menus including Order History and Delivery Schedule links, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with idle handling options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend data fetching: useOrderHistory fetches customer orders and useDeliverySchedule fetches delivery information for specific orders using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm dairy-themed color palette for light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and component colors. Also defines base styles for body and a utility class for Hindi text rendering.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying Parwati Dairy's location (Ramnagar, Hazaribagh), phone numbers (8553965714, 6205017829), and business information with styled cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/DeliverySchedule.tsx: Displays pending delivery schedule by fetching orders with 'placed' status for a customer, showing delivery details with date/time formatting and handling loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section featuring Parwati Dairy logo and tagline, navigation buttons for Milk/Paneer/Ghee orders and Contact, plus a features section highlighting product benefits.
frontend/src/pages/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component with validation for name, phone, address, product selection (Milk/Paneer/Ghee), and quantity, submitting orders via WhatsApp and including PhonePe QR code payment integration.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Displays customer's order history with status badges (placed/delivered/canceled), date formatting, and status icons, fetching data via useOrderHistory hook with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products page component displaying three dairy products (Milk, Paneer, Ghee) with Hindi names, prices, descriptions, and 'Order Now' buttons that navigate to the order form with pre-selected product.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: WhatsApp integration utility that formats order data into a message and opens WhatsApp with pre-filled text to phone number 918553965714.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, Hindi font support (Noto Sans Devanagari), custom shadows, animations, and responsive container settings.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for Parwati Dairy mobile app, listing implemented features (home screen, products page, order form, WhatsApp integration, contact page), known issues (QR code payment not displaying), and architectural notes.
